headline: Rockwell Automation to Report Third Quarter Fiscal 2026 Results
summary: MILWAUKEE, July 21, 2026--Rockwell Automation, Inc. (NYSE: ROK) is scheduled to report its third quarter fiscal 2026 results on Tuesday, Aug. 4, before the market opens. The release will be posted on the Rockwell Investor Relations website at www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/investors.html.
